name: Linear Algebra — Vector Spaces
description: Vector space V over field F: abelian under +, scalar multiplication with compatibilities. Subspace, span, linear independence, basis, dimension. Steinitz exchange.
mermaid:
graph TD
    V1["V1 (V,+) abelian"]
    V2["V2 Scalar mult\ncompat with + ·"]
    D1["Def: Subspace\nW ⊆ V closed"]
    D2["Def: Span\n⟨S⟩ = all lin comb"]
    D3["Def: Lin indep\n∑cᵢvᵢ=0 ⇒ cᵢ=0"]
    D4["Def: Basis\nspanning + lin indep"]
    D5["Def: Dimension\ndim V = |basis|"]
    T1["Thm: All bases\nsame size"]
    T2["Thm: Steinitz exchange"]
    V1 --> D1
    V2 --> D1
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> D4
    D4 --> D5
    D4 --> T1
    D4 --> T2
    classDef axiom fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class V1,V2 axiom
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5 definition
    class T1,T2 theorem
